meaning: n.(古希伯来人中的)修行者,(巴勒斯坦地区北部古城)拿撒勒人
examples: Then slowly the Nazarite youth began to incline to the indulgent lifestyle of the neighboring Philistines.
He takes a vow, a Nazarite vow, he shaves his head, he donates money which goes to the temple for sacrifices, and he himself goes to the temple to worship.
And the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the LORD: this is holy for the priest, with the wave breast and heave shoulder: and after that the Nazarite may drink wine.
